_note: Edit this file to control which chats the daily ingest scans. Removing a chat skips it. The script also auto-picks up new groups with >threshold messages whose name contains the keyword list below. The entries below are ILLUSTRATIVE PLACEHOLDERS — replace with your own chat IDs and names.

dms.name: {{PERSON_1}} ({{ORG_C}})
